prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约10988→11593→13398→12627→13615名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近5年累计后移约2627名；2025年基准位次约13615 名，较2024年回升约988名，但仍处于近年高位；该校在上海市招生计划2021–2023年均为4人，2024–2025年增至5人；2026年计划缩减至3人，较2025年减 少2人（缩招40%），名额明显收紧，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第56名（2026年），近年排名在54–61之间波动，整体稳定 在中上211水平；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音平台热度一般，未进入全国高校热度前100名，报考关注度处于中等水平；该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势，但在上海市招生专业以经济学类、自动化为主，与核心优势学科关联度有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 招生专业中经济学类属金融/财经大类，2024年社会热度为"分化观望"；自动化属电气/自动化大类，2024年社会热度为"高热推荐"；上海市2026年高考 考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35.4%，竞争压力显著上升；学校位于湖北武汉，属中部地区；上海考生整 体偏好本地及长三角高校，对中部地区高校报考热度一般；该校在沪招生人数极少（3–5人），地域偏好对报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13615名、20 26年招生计划大幅缩招40%及上海市考生总数增长约35%三重因素，竞争环境明显收紧，预计录取位次将显著前移，结合考生规模激增做小幅修正，预 测2026年最低录取位次约10147名，区间9647–10647名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年该校在沪仅招3人（经济学类2人、自动化1人），名额极少。位次在预测区间9647–10647名以内，建议以二档经济学类为主攻方向、一档自动化作为冲刺；位次明显优于区 间下限可重点考虑自动化专业。由于招生人数极少，报考风险较高，建议同时准备其他院校保底方案。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai comprehensive category were approximately 10988 → 11593 → 13398 → 12627 → 13615, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2627 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13615, an increase of about 988 positions compared to 2024, but still at a high level in recent years; the university's enrollment plan in Shanghai was 4 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 5 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is reduced to 3 students, a decrease of 2 students (40% reduction) compared to 2025, with significantly tightened quotas and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, fluctuating between 54–61 in recent years, overall stable at the mid-to-upper 211 level; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps; Douyin platform popularity is average, not in the top 100 national university popularity rankings, with moderate application attention; the university's traditional strengths are geology and geological resources and geological engineering, but the majors recruited in Shanghai are mainly economics and automation, with limited relevance to its core advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the recruited majors, economics belongs to the finance/economics category, with a 2024 social popularity of 'differentiated wait-and-see'; automation belongs to the electrical/automation category, with a 2024 social popularity of 'highly recommended'; the total number of Shanghai college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, leading to a significant rise in competitive pressure; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region; Shanghai candidates generally prefer local and Yangtze River Delta universities, with average enthusiasm for central region universities; the university's enrollment in Shanghai is extremely small (3–5 students), so regional preference has limited impact on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the 2025 baseline ranking of 13615, the significant 40% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the approximately 35% increase in the number of Shanghai candidates, the competitive environment has clearly tightened, and the admission ranking is expected to shift significantly forward. With a minor correction due to the surge in candidate numbers, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is about 10147, with a range of 9647–10647.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics (including Economics, International Economics and Trade majors)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the university will only recruit 3 students in Shanghai (2 for Economics, 1 for Automation), with extremely limited slots. If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9647–10647, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Economics as the main target and Tier 1 Automation as a reach; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can prioritize the Automation major. Due to the extremely small number of recruits, the application risk is high, so it is advisable to also prepare backup plans with other universities.
